---
title: "Section 2: Quality Control & Filtering"
author: "Konda Divya Reddy"
date: "`r Sys.Date()`"
output:
  html_document:
    toc: true
    toc_float: true
    theme: flatly
    code_folding: show
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo=TRUE, warning=FALSE, message=FALSE,
                      fig.width=9, fig.height=6)
```

## 1. Load libraries
```{r libraries}
library(Seurat)
library(tidyverse)
library(patchwork)
library(scDblFinder)
library(SingleCellExperiment)
```

## 2. Load checkpoint
```{r load}
out_dir    <- "/N/scratch/dikonda/seaad_scrna/results"
seurat_obj <- readRDS(file.path(out_dir, "01_seurat_loaded.rds"))
cat("Loaded:", nrow(seurat_obj), "genes x", ncol(seurat_obj), "nuclei\n")
```

## 3. Compute QC metrics
```{r qc-metrics}
seurat_obj[["pct_mt"]]    <- PercentageFeatureSet(seurat_obj, pattern = "^MT-")
seurat_obj[["pct_ribo"]]  <- PercentageFeatureSet(seurat_obj, pattern = "^RP[SL]")
seurat_obj[["log10_nCount"]] <- log10(seurat_obj$nCount_RNA + 1)
summary(seurat_obj@meta.data[, c("nCount_RNA", "nFeature_RNA", "pct_mt", "pct_ribo")])
```

## 4. Visualize distributions

### 4.1 Violin plots
```{r violin, fig.height=7}
VlnPlot(
  seurat_obj,
  features = c("nFeature_RNA", "nCount_RNA", "pct_mt", "pct_ribo"),
  group.by = "Diagnosis",
  ncol     = 2,
  pt.size  = 0
) & theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1))
```

### 4.2 Scatter plots
```{r scatter, fig.height=5}
p1 <- FeatureScatter(seurat_obj, "nCount_RNA", "nFeature_RNA",
                     group.by = "Diagnosis") +
      geom_smooth(method = "lm", se = FALSE, color = "black", linewidth = 0.5)
p2 <- FeatureScatter(seurat_obj, "nCount_RNA", "pct_mt",
                     group.by = "Diagnosis") +
      geom_hline(yintercept = 5, linetype = "dashed", color = "firebrick")
p1 + p2
```

### 4.3 Histograms
```{r histograms, fig.height=8}
meta <- seurat_obj@meta.data

h1 <- ggplot(meta, aes(x = nFeature_RNA)) +
  geom_histogram(bins = 100, fill = "#1D9E75", alpha = 0.8) +
  geom_vline(xintercept = c(200, 7500), linetype = "dashed", color = "firebrick") +
  labs(title = "Genes per nucleus") + theme_minimal()

h2 <- ggplot(meta, aes(x = nCount_RNA)) +
  geom_histogram(bins = 100, fill = "#378ADD", alpha = 0.8) +
  geom_vline(xintercept = 500, linetype = "dashed", color = "firebrick") +
  scale_x_log10() +
  labs(title = "UMI count (log10)") + theme_minimal()

h3 <- ggplot(meta, aes(x = pct_mt)) +
  geom_histogram(bins = 80, fill = "#D85A30", alpha = 0.8) +
  geom_vline(xintercept = 5, linetype = "dashed", color = "firebrick") +
  labs(title = "Mitochondrial %") + theme_minimal()

h4 <- ggplot(meta, aes(x = pct_ribo)) +
  geom_histogram(bins = 80, fill = "#7F77DD", alpha = 0.8) +
  labs(title = "Ribosomal %") + theme_minimal()

(h1 + h2) / (h3 + h4)
```

## 5. Doublet detection
```{r doublets}
message("Running scDblFinder...")
sce <- as.SingleCellExperiment(seurat_obj)
set.seed(42)
sce <- scDblFinder(sce, samples = "Donor ID")
seurat_obj$dbl_score <- sce$scDblFinder.score
seurat_obj$dbl_class <- sce$scDblFinder.class
cat("\nDoublet summary:\n")
print(table(seurat_obj$dbl_class))
cat(sprintf("Doublet rate: %.1f%%\n",
    100 * mean(seurat_obj$dbl_class == "doublet")))
```

```{r doublet-plot}
ggplot(seurat_obj@meta.data, aes(x = dbl_score, fill = dbl_class)) +
  geom_histogram(bins = 80, alpha = 0.8, position = "identity") +
  scale_fill_manual(values = c("singlet" = "#1D9E75", "doublet" = "#D85A30")) +
  labs(title = "Doublet score distribution",
       x = "scDblFinder score", y = "Count", fill = "Class") +
  theme_minimal()
```

## 6. Filter nuclei
```{r filter}
MIN_FEATURES <- 200
MAX_FEATURES <- 7500
MIN_COUNTS   <- 500
MAX_PCT_MT   <- 5

n_before <- ncol(seurat_obj)

seurat_obj <- subset(
  seurat_obj,
  subset = nFeature_RNA >= MIN_FEATURES &
           nFeature_RNA <= MAX_FEATURES &
           nCount_RNA   >= MIN_COUNTS   &
           pct_mt       <  MAX_PCT_MT   &
           dbl_class    == "singlet"
)

n_after <- ncol(seurat_obj)
cat(sprintf("Before : %d\nAfter  : %d\nRemoved: %d (%.1f%%)\n",
    n_before, n_after, n_before - n_after,
    100 * (n_before - n_after) / n_before))
```

## 7. Post-QC violin plots
```{r post-qc}
VlnPlot(
  seurat_obj,
  features = c("nFeature_RNA", "nCount_RNA", "pct_mt"),
  group.by = "Diagnosis",
  ncol     = 3,
  pt.size  = 0
) & theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1))
```

## 8. Save
```{r save}
saveRDS(seurat_obj, file.path(out_dir, "02_seurat_qc_filtered.rds"))

seurat_obj@meta.data %>%
  rownames_to_column("nucleus_id") %>%
  select(nucleus_id, nCount_RNA, nFeature_RNA, pct_mt,
         pct_ribo, dbl_score, dbl_class, Diagnosis, `Donor ID`) %>%
  write_csv(file.path(out_dir, "02_qc_metrics.csv"))

cat("Saved.\n")
```

## Session info
```{r session}
sessionInfo()
```
